page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Biasaway: a tool to generate composition-matched background sequences
page_metadata.biotools__summary: BiasAway is a command-line and web server to generate nucleotide composition-matched DNA background sequences. The BiasAway tool provides users with six approaches to generate synthetic or genomic background sequences matching mono- and Dinucleotide composition of user-provided foreground sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BiasAway is a command-line and web server to generate nucleotide composition-matched DNA background sequences. The BiasAway tool provides users with six approaches to generate synthetic or genomic background sequences matching mono- and Dinucleotide composition of user-provided foreground sequences.
